requirement_topic.en: Safety and EMC Responsibility: NS Alignment with IEC and NCC

summary.en: Nigeria adopts NS standards with close reference to IEC-based structures for electrical safety and related testing logic. For heat pumps and split air-conditioners, NS coverage can include safety testing principles comparable to IEC 60335 family, while NCC involvement addresses radio and EMC aspects for products with wireless or communication modules. Safety documentation should map to Nigerian authorities and importer-facing declarations.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚采用NS体系并大量与IEC结构对接。热泵和挂机空调在安全测试上通常采用与IEC 60335系列同类思路的要求，同时带无线或通讯模块的产品还需考虑NCC无线与EMC职责。安全文件应能够对应尼日利亚主管机构与进口商声明。
summary.zht: 尼日利亞採用NS體系並大量與IEC結構銜接。熱泵和掛機空調在安全測試上通常採用與IEC 60335系列同類思路的要求，同時帶無線或通訊模組的產品還需考慮NCC無線與EMC責任。安全文件應能對應尼日利亞主管機構與進口商聲明。

standards_or_laws: NS (Nigeria Standards) alignment with IEC frameworks
Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) radio and EMC pathways

summary.en: China’s safety and EMC evidence for heat pumps relies on GB family standards and GB 9237-style safety logic for refrigerant systems. These datasets are helpful baseline material, but they do not auto-transfer to NS and NCC conformance language.
summary.zh: 中国热泵的安全与EMC证据常基于GB系列和GB 9237相关风险逻辑，可作为起始材料，但不能直接按原样转为NS和NCC的合规语言。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵的安全與EMC證據常基於GB系列和GB 9237相關風險邏輯，可作為起始材料，但不能直接按原樣轉為NS和NCC的合規語言。

standards_or_laws: China electrical safety and EMC suite
China gas refrigeration and electrical safety references

gap.en: The core gap is evidentiary: test reports and declarations must be mapped to NS wording, NCC submission expectations, and local representative structures for radio/EMC declarations.
gap.zh: 核心差异是证据表达与提交路径。测试报告与声明需重新映射为NS语言、NCC申报要求和本地责任结构，尤其是带无线功能的机型。
gap.zht: 核心差異是證據表述與提交路徑。測試報告與聲明需重新映射為NS語言、NCC申報要求和本地責任結構，尤其是帶無線功能的機型。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where NS and/or NCC scope is triggered
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in comparable Chinese electrical and EMC classes; not directly interchangeable

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Safety and EMC claims need Nigeria-facing adaptation; Chinese test reports should be treated as technical baseline only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安全和EMC声明需要尼日利亚化处理，中文测试报告通常只能作为技术基础。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安全和EMC聲明需要尼日利亞化處理，中文測試報告通常只能作為技術基礎。
